name: Paul McCartney
description: English musician and member of the Beatles (born 1942)
abstract: Sir James Paul McCartney (born 18 June 1942) is an English musician and songwriter. He gained global fame with the Beatles, for whom he was the bassist and keyboardist, and shared primary songwriting and lead vocal duties with John Lennon.

works.t: I Want to Hold Your Hand
I Want to Hold Your Hand

works_created.t: Liverpool Oratorio: The world you're coming into

about_quotes.speaker: Tom Scott
about_quotes.evidence: When you played on that Wings track... Paul said... 'He turned up in half an hour. He put his headphones on and started playing along casually.'
about_quotes.doc_title: Tom Scott interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, April 1, 2022 [interview 1 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Tom Malone
about_quotes.evidence: Charles Rose... got called to do Paul McCartney in New York, do his album... We did six songs in six hours like that... Paul bought us lunch.
about_quotes.doc_title: Tom Malone interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, May 3, 2023

about_quotes.speaker: Laurence Juber
about_quotes.evidence: And then I joined Wings... We did — one song we did, “Baby’s Request” was a demo for the Mills Brothers.
about_quotes.doc_title: Laurence Juber interviewed by Monk Rowe, Glasgow, Scotland, July 27, 2016 [interview 1 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Jon Weber
about_quotes.evidence: Now if Paul McCartney wanders in, what do you give him? You give him “Linda.”
about_quotes.doc_title: Jon Weber interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, June 2, 2012

about_quotes.speaker: Dick Spottswood
about_quotes.evidence: people with incomes like Eric Clapton and Paul McCartney can afford
about_quotes.doc_title: Dick Spottswood interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, February 13, 2023

about_quotes.speaker: Alan Broadbent
about_quotes.evidence: I was invited by Diana Krall, who was involved in producing this album with Paul. ... So she and Paul and her rhythm section had already put down the tracks. ... I know exactly when he meant is that what they need is not something which would be inappropriate, to suddenly soar over the strings
about_quotes.doc_title: Alan Broadbent interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, October 26, 2023
